author: WomH
content: Plan: Working through phases 3-5 in order. Phase 3: (a) Move insert_dataset/write_samples logic to Repository, (b) Extract with_appview_fallback() to atmosphere/_appview.py, (c) Eager init for _AtmosphereBackend. Phase 4: (a) Redis label created_at, (b) Redis pipeline, (c) SQLite indexes. Phase 5: (a) RecordOps/BlobOps/XrpcClient, (b) FutureWarning, (c) thread-safety, (d) StubManager split.
